description: Open-source backend-as-a-service platform providing PostgreSQL database, authentication, file storage, instant APIs, edge functions, and realtime capabilities. Positioned as an open-source alternative to Firebase with SQL instead of NoSQL.

free.description: Generous free tier for learning, prototyping, and launching MVPs.
limitations: Projects pause after 1 week of inactivity

pro.description: Most popular tier for production applications needing predictable performance and room to scale.
features_included: Spend cap enabled by default to prevent runaway bills

team.description: Bridges the gap between hobby projects and production apps, accessible for startups and small teams.
features_included: Same 100 GB quota and overage pricing as Pro

enterprise.description: Custom plan tailored to large-scale applications with compliance and scalability features.

compute_instances.micro_default_pro: ~$12/month (covered by $10 credit) — 2-core shared ARM, 1 GB RAM

point_in_time_recovery_pitr.cost: $100/month for 7-day retention; Enterprise unlocks up to 28-day retention

add_ons.hipaa_projects: Available as paid add-on for Team or Enterprise plans; cost is custom

database.description: Full Postgres database with extensions support, read replicas (in early preview)

authentication.description: Prebuilt authentication/user management system with no need for third-party tools

storage.description: Store and serve large files directly from the platform using storage buckets (S3-compatible object storage)

edge_functions.description: Serverless Deno-based functions that run closer to the user, reducing latency. Best suited for lightweight serverless logic.

realtime.description: Subscribe to Postgres changes for real-time updates on CRUD operations. Includes Broadcast and Presence features.

instant_apis.description: Auto-generated REST and GraphQL APIs from your database schema

notable_details: Spend cap enabled by default on Pro plan to prevent runaway bills
Free projects pause after 1 week of inactivity
API requests are unlimited on all plans
CLI available for managing projects via command line
Provides Prometheus-compatible metrics endpoints for monitoring
Realistic production Pro plan baseline is ~$110-120/month when including dedicated Large compute
Supabase is often 30-50% cheaper than Firebase at scale due to resource-based vs per-operation pricing
